phase.name: Pre-flight Decisions
phase.description: Three architectural decisions that affect every subsequent phase. Must be resolved with user before writing any code.

task.name: Dataset filename decision
task.description:
MiniVess NIfTI files are named minivess_00001_image.nii.gz — this is the UPSTREAM dataset convention from s3://minivessdataset, not project naming. 498 references in split JSON files, 662 path references across 74 files.
Options: A) Keep minivess_* filenames (dataset identity preserved, accept mismatch) B) Rename files on disk + update splits + re-push to DVC (clean but risky)
RECOMMENDATION: Option A — dataset names are external identity, not branding. The dataset IS called MiniVess. The platform is called VASCADIA.
task.risk: HIGH if Option B chosen — breaks DVC hashes, requires data re-push

task.name: GCP project decision
task.description:
GCP project minivess-mlops CANNOT be renamed. Affects: - 3 GCS buckets (minivess-mlops-dvc-data, -mlflow-artifacts, -checkpoints) - GAR registry (europe-north1-docker.pkg.dev/minivess-mlops/minivess/) - Pulumi stack - ~60 references across 34 files
Options: A) Create new GCP project vascadia + new buckets + new registry (clean, ~$5 migration cost) B) Keep minivess-mlops as GCP project, accept infra/branding mismatch C) Keep GCP project but create new GAR repo (europe-north1-docker.pkg.dev/minivess-mlops/vascadia/)
RECOMMENDATION: Option C — least disruption. GCP project name is invisible to users. New GAR repo under same project. Buckets can stay (they store data, not branding).
task.effort: Decision + 1 hour if Option A, 15 min if Option C
task.risk: HIGH if Option A — data migration, Pulumi re-provision

task.name: Archive docs decision
task.description:
150+ files in docs/planning/v0-2_archive/ contain ~1,200 "minivess" references. These are historical planning documents.
Options: A) Leave as-is (historical artifacts, "minivess" was the name at that time) B) Bulk find-replace (mechanical but noisy git history)
RECOMMENDATION: Option A — these are historical. Adding a note to the archive README that "MinIVess was renamed to VASCADIA in v0.2.0-beta" is sufficient.

task.name: Environment variable naming decision
task.description:
MINIVESS_ALLOW_HOST (115 occurrences, 60+ files) and MINIVESS_DEBUG_SUFFIX are the main env vars. Options: A) Rename to VASCADIA_ALLOW_HOST etc. (clean but massive test churn) B) Keep MINIVESS_* env vars (accept naming mismatch, zero test changes) C) Support both with fallback: VASCADIA_ALLOW_HOST || MINIVESS_ALLOW_HOST
RECOMMENDATION: Option A with a single-commit bulk replace.

phase.name: Python Package Rename
phase.description: Rename src/minivess/ → src/vascadia/ and update all imports. ~3,100 import statements across ~477 files. Fully mechanical.

task.name: Rename source directory
task.description: git mv src/minivess src/vascadia Update pyproject.toml: - name = "vascadia" (line 10) - packages = ["src/vascadia"] (line 179) - known-first-party = ["vascadia"] (line 209) - mypy module overrides (lines 321-343) - coverage source (line 411)

task.name: Update all source imports
task.description:
Bulk replace in src/vascadia/: - "from minivess." → "from vascadia." - "import minivess" → "import vascadia" - "minivess." in string literals (module paths in error messages)
619 occurrences across 177 files.

task.name: Update all test imports
task.description:
Bulk replace in tests/: - "from minivess." → "from vascadia." - "import minivess" → "import vascadia" - patch("minivess.xxx") → patch("vascadia.xxx") (176 mock paths in 32 files)
~2,500 occurrences across 300 files.

task.name: Update conftest.py files
task.description: 3 conftest.py files reference minivess module paths. Also update MINIVESS_* env vars if P0-D4 decided to rename.

task.name: Rename test file
task.description: git mv tests/v2/unit/test_minivess_downloader.py tests/v2/unit/test_vascadia_downloader.py

task.name: VERIFY: make test-staging
task.description: Run full staging test suite. Must pass 6000+ tests, 0 failures.

phase.name: Docker Infrastructure
phase.description: Rename all Docker image names, container names, network names. ~215 occurrences across 23 files. Requires rebuilding all images.

task.name: Update docker-compose.yml
task.description: Rename in deployment/docker-compose.yml (40 occurrences): - container_name: minivess-* → vascadia-* - image: minivess-* → vascadia-* - Network name: minivess → vascadia - Postgres user: minivess → vascadia - BentoML home: /home/minivess/ → /home/vascadia/

task.name: Update docker-compose.flows.yml
task.description: Rename in deployment/docker-compose.flows.yml (62 occurrences): - All flow image names (17 services) - Network references - Container name prefixes

task.name: Update Dockerfiles
task.description: 21 Dockerfiles reference minivess image names (113 occurrences). Key files: - deployment/docker/Dockerfile.base (FROM, user creation) - deployment/docker/Dockerfile.base-cpu - deployment/docker/Dockerfile.base-light - 14 flow-specific Dockerfiles (FROM minivess-base:latest) - deployment/bento/Dockerfile (BentoML) - deployment/docker/Dockerfile.mlflow-gcp - deployment/docker/Dockerfile.benchmark

task.name: Update SkyPilot YAML image references
task.description: 8 SkyPilot YAML files reference Docker image names. Update image_id: docker:ghcr.io/.../minivess-* → vascadia-* Update cluster name: minivess-dev → vascadia-dev

task.name: Update Makefile and justfile
task.description: Makefile: ~55 occurrences (image names, cluster names, paths) justfile: 7 occurrences

task.name: Update supporting deployment files
task.description: - deployment/falco/minivess_rules.yaml → vascadia_rules.yaml (8 occurrences) - deployment/bento/service.py: MODEL_NAME, service name (3 occurrences) - deployment/bento/bentofile.yaml (2 occurrences) - deployment/prometheus/alert_rules.yml (2 occurrences) - deployment/grafana/*.json (24 occurrences across 7 files) - frontend/package.json, observable/package.json (2 occurrences)

task.name: VERIFY: docker compose config --quiet
task.description: Validate all compose files parse correctly after rename.

phase.name: MLflow and Observability
phase.description: Rename MLflow experiment names, Prometheus metrics, config files.

task.name: Update MLflow experiment constants
task.description:
src/minivess/orchestration/constants.py: - EXPERIMENT_TRAINING: "minivess_training" → "vascadia_training" - EXPERIMENT_DATA: "minivess_data" → "vascadia_data" - EXPERIMENT_EVALUATION: "minivess_evaluation" → "vascadia_evaluation" - EXPERIMENT_DEPLOYMENT, EXPERIMENT_DASHBOARD, EXPERIMENT_HPO
Also update ~50 consumer files that hardcode these strings instead of using the constants (identified in code review).

task.name: Update Prometheus metric names
task.description: src/minivess/observability/prometheus_metrics.py: 13 metrics with minivess_ prefix deployment/prometheus/alert_rules.yml: 2 metric references deployment/grafana/*.json: 24 dashboard references

task.name: Update .env.example
task.description: 21 occurrences of minivess in .env.example: - POSTGRES_USER, container host names, Docker image names - GCP references (keep or change per P0-D2 decision) - Prefect logger name

task.name: Update Hydra config files
task.description: - configs/data/minivess.yaml → configs/data/minivess.yaml (KEEP — dataset name) - configs/experiment/*.yaml — experiment_name references - configs/cloud/*.yaml — cluster names, image names

task.name: Update DVC config
task.description: .dvc/config: remote URL references dvc.yaml: path references to data/raw/minivess/ (KEEP if P0-D1 = Option A) data/minivess.dvc: DVC tracking file (KEEP — tracks the dataset)

phase.name: Documentation
phase.description: Update user-facing documentation. Internal docs can be done gradually.

task.name: Update README.md
task.description: Full rewrite of README header, badges, installation instructions. Replace NEUROVEX/MinIVess with VASCADIA throughout. Update GitHub URLs to new repo name. Add paper title.

task.name: Update root CLAUDE.md
task.description: 13 occurrences. Context-sensitive — some are architectural descriptions, some are rule references. Must preserve meaning while updating name. Update paper title from NEUROVEX to VASCADIA.

task.name: Update subdirectory CLAUDE.md files
task.description: 6 subdirectory CLAUDE.md files (~45 occurrences total): - src/minivess/adapters/CLAUDE.md - src/minivess/config/CLAUDE.md - src/minivess/data/CLAUDE.md - src/minivess/observability/CLAUDE.md - src/minivess/orchestration/CLAUDE.md - src/minivess/pipeline/CLAUDE.md - deployment/CLAUDE.md - tests/CLAUDE.md

task.name: Update knowledge graph YAML files
task.description: ~200 occurrences across 40+ KG YAML files. Most are prose descriptions. Bulk replace "MinIVess" → "VASCADIA" and "minivess" → "vascadia" where it refers to the project (not dataset).

task.name: Update MEMORY.md and .claude/ files
task.description: memory/MEMORY.md: update project name references .claude/metalearning/: 50 files, 132 occurrences — bulk replace project name .claude/skills/: skill descriptions referencing minivess .claude/rules/: rule files referencing minivess

task.name: Add archive README note
task.description: Add note to docs/planning/v0-2_archive/README.md: "Historical note: documents in this archive refer to the project as 'MinIVess MLOps' — the project was renamed to VASCADIA in v0.2.0-beta (2026-03). The archive is preserved as-is for historical accuracy."

task.name: Update scripts/*.py
task.description: 36 Python scripts, 171 occurrences. Mostly import paths. Rename scripts/download_minivess.py → scripts/download_minivess.py (KEEP — downloads MiniVess dataset)

task.name: Update scripts/*.sh
task.description: 24 shell scripts, 103 occurrences. Docker image names, cluster names, data paths.

task.name: Update GitHub Actions workflows
task.description: 7 workflow files, 23 occurrences. Image names, repo references. NOTE: CI is disabled (workflow_dispatch only) so low risk.

task.name: Update pre-commit config
task.description: .pre-commit-config.yaml: 1 occurrence

phase.name: GCP Infrastructure
phase.description: Conditional on P0-D2 decision. If Option C (new GAR repo only): minimal changes. If Option A (new project): full re-provision.

task.name: Create new GAR repository (Option C)
task.description:
If P0-D2 = Option C: gcloud artifacts repositories create vascadia \ --repository-format=docker \ --location=europe-north1 \ --project=minivess-mlops
New path: europe-north1-docker.pkg.dev/minivess-mlops/vascadia/ Update all image push/pull references.

task.name: Update Pulumi config (if needed)
task.description: deployment/pulumi/gcp/__main__.py: update GAR repo name deployment/pulumi/gcp/Pulumi.yaml: stack name

task.name: Full test suite
task.description: make test-staging — must pass 6000+ tests, 0 failures, 0 skips

task.name: Lint and type check
task.description: uv run ruff check src/ tests/ && uv run mypy src/

task.name: Docker compose validation
task.description: docker compose -f deployment/docker-compose.yml config --quiet

task.name: Grep audit for remaining minivess references
task.description:
grep -r "minivess" src/ tests/ deployment/ configs/ scripts/ Makefile \ --include="*.py" --include="*.yaml" --include="*.yml" --include="*.toml" \ --include="*.sh" --include="*.json" \ | grep -v "data/raw/minivess" \ | grep -v "minivess.dvc" \ | grep -v "download_minivess" \ | grep -v "v0-2_archive"
Must return 0 results (excluding dataset paths and archive).

task.name: Update version to 0.2.0-beta
task.description: pyproject.toml version = "0.2.0-beta"

key_risks.risk: GCP project cannot be renamed — accept mismatch or re-provision
Dataset filenames are upstream convention — do not rename
All Docker images must be rebuilt after rename
MLflow experiment history references old names
